behavior_summary: This script is a thin wrapper for a door object that forwards engine events to a shared DOOR_NS implementation.
U8P_TDOOR_NS::look responds to the game's 'U8P_TDOOR_NS::look' (inspect) process by calling DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked to present lock/state information.
U8P_TDOOR_NS::use handles player 'U8P_TDOOR_NS::use' actions by calling DOOR_NS::useDoor to perform open/close/attempt-unlock behavior and associated effects (animations/sounds).
U8P_TDOOR_NS::gotHit forwards hit events (uword, word) to DOOR_NS::func0C82, likely to handle hit reactions, damage, or forced-unlock logic.
notable_control_flow: All visible control flow is delegation: each process immediately calls a DOOR_NS routine and does not read or write any global flags.
No branching, menus, or player-dialogue logic are present in this script; behavioral complexity resides in the DOOR_NS callees.
U8P_TDOOR_NS::gotHit accepts parameters and forwards them; the script itself does not mutate local state or gate behavior.
open_questions: What exact behaviors DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked, DOOR_NS::useDoor, and DOOR_NS::func0C82 implement (messages, animations, lock checks, HP/damage, or forced-unlock)?
What are the semantic meanings and ranges of the U8P_TDOOR_NS::gotHit parameters (uword, word) as forwarded to DOOR_NS::func0C82?
Is this script ever instrumented by global flags elsewhere (in DOOR_NS) that would affect the forwarded behavior?

main_function.name: U8P_TDOOR_NS::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player's inspect/U8P_TDOOR_NS::look interaction by delegating to the shared door check routine to report lock/state information.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player 'looks at' or inspects the door (process type 0x0208).
May also be executed when an actor enters a U8P_TDOOR_NS::look-type fast-area or inspection trigger (inferred from process classification).

function_map.name: U8P_TDOOR_NS::look
function_map.role: Inspect/description handler that delegates lock/state reporting.

function_map.name: U8P_TDOOR_NS::use
function_map.role: Handle player U8P_TDOOR_NS::use interactions by delegating to DOOR_NS::useDoor.

function_map.name: U8P_TDOOR_NS::gotHit
function_map.role: Forward hit events (parameters) to a DOOR_NS hit handler.

function_map.name: DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked
function_map.role: External routine called to evaluate/report door lock/state when inspected.

function_map.name: DOOR_NS::useDoor
function_map.role: External routine called to perform door U8P_TDOOR_NS::use behavior (open/close/attempt unlock, animations/sounds).

function_map.name: DOOR_NS::func0C82
function_map.role: External routine called to handle hit reactions/damage or forced-unlock logic when the door is hit.

external_calls.purpose: Determine and present the door's lock/state information during an inspect/U8P_TDOOR_NS::look event.
Perform the door 'U8P_TDOOR_NS::use' action (open/close/attempt unlock, play animations/sounds).
Handle the door being hit (hit reaction, damage, or forced-unlock behavior); parameters forwarded from U8P_TDOOR_NS::gotHit.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script is a thin wrapper for a door object that forwards engine events to a shared DOOR_NS implementation.
